Name: Average time from SW-Reviewer Declined to SW-AE Assign Reviewers
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Total time between SW-Reviewer Declined and the next occurrence of SW-Reviewer Agreed within the same case
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average time it takes to perform SW-AE Assign Reviewers after SW-Reviewer Declined
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Minimum time from SW-Reviewer Declined to SW-Reviewer Selection is now due
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is now due'

Name: Average waiting time to SW-AE Assign Reviewers following SW-Reviewer Declined
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Total resolution time of SW-Reviewer Declined measured as the duration until a new reviewer is successfully assigned (i.e., until SW-Reviewer Agreed)
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average time from SW-Reviewer Declined to SW-Reviewer Selection is 3 days late
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is 3 days late'

Name: Elapsed time between SW-Reviewer Declined and Assign a Different Editor when the latter occurs in the same variant
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'Assign a Different Editor'

Name: Average time it takes SW-Reviewer Declined to be followed by Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1'

Name: Total time from SW-Reviewer Declined to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in variants where the process eventually reaches a decision
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Minimum time between SW-Reviewer Declined and Unassign Reviewer when both appear in the same trace
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'Unassign Reviewer'

Name: Average cycle time of SW-Reviewer Declined defined as the interval between its occurrence and the subsequent completion of a valid reviewer assignment (SW-Reviewer Agreed)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average time from SW-Reviewer Declined to SW-Reviewer Unavailable in traces where both events occur
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Unavailable'

Name: Total time between SW-Reviewer Declined and SW-Reviewer No Response in cases where no response follows a decline
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer No Response'

Name: Average time it takes to transition from SW-Reviewer Declined to SW-Initial Reviewer Selection when the editor restarts the selection process
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'
